questionHtml: Compare, giving a reason, the length of the bond between the carbon atoms in ethyne with that in ethane, C2H6.
markschemeHtml:
«ethyne» shorter AND a greater number of shared/bonding electrons
OR
«ethyne» shorter AND stronger bond  [✔]

meta.title: Compare, giving a reason, the length of the bond between the carbon atoms in ethyne with that in ethane, C2H6.
